resolution: Board of Education participated in March 4 special meeting to receive workgroup findings as confirmed by March 11 meeting approval of Education Capital Workgroup recommendations
Tamika Hunter was appointed to Land of Sky Regional Council Board of Delegates position on May 28, 2024
Structural engineer's maintenance plan for Brevard High School was presented at May 13 meeting
Structural engineer's maintenance plan was provided to Transylvania County Schools as discussed in subsequent meetings
PowerPoint slides with education capital recommendations were emailed to Superintendent as evidenced by ongoing school project discussions
Elections general counsel guidance was obtained as evidenced by ongoing election preparations in subsequent meetings
Last year's NCACC legislative goals were provided to Commissioners for review and new goals were approved in July
Softball field lighting funding recommendation was presented and approved as part of athletic facilities funding
Revised audit contract was approved with Martin Starnes & Associates for additional auditor support
Grant application was sent back to Board of Education with suggested changes and was later approved in revised form
Updated 2016 forest resolution was prepared and approved by the Board to oppose Pisgah National Forest Plan amendment
Terms of Transylvania County Schools agreements were negotiated and project management agreements were approved
Letter to State Superintendent regarding BHS project delay was drafted and sent as discussed in subsequent meetings
Contract for Brevard Elementary School playground with Blue Ridge Playgrounds was presented and approved
Commissioners submitted budget questions and scenarios by Friday deadline for June 17 workshop preparation
Commissioners were emailed and capital workshop meeting was scheduled for fall as discussed in subsequent meetings
Joint School Bond Committee briefing was provided on CMAR selection process and timeline updates
Response was sent to Department of Corrections confirming July 1 effective date for Probation & Parole lease
Assessment report findings for Rosman retaining wall were provided in September with additional scope information
Printed copies of NCACC County Map Book were requested and provided to Board members
Revised TNRC bylaws reflecting new structure as Planning Board advisory committee were presented and approved
Draft Memorandum of Understanding agreements for Rosman and Pisgah Labs infrastructure projects were presented and approved
Chairman scheduled and formally presented water system interconnect resolutions to mayors of Brevard and Rosman
Staff scheduled public hearing for transit service discontinuation consideration as authorized by Board
Review of County Commissioner appointments was placed on January agenda for formal action
Clerk to Board advertised Board of Health vacancies for Pharmacist, Veterinarian, and Physician positions
Clerk to Board advertised remaining vacancy on Brevard Board of Adjustment and Appeal
